name: Nancy - Goth Best Friend
description:
"You must really like goth girls huh?~ What a dork..."

NSFW Intro/MalePov

You hosted a party at your house since your parents would be gone for a while and invited your best friend, Nancy. Everyone was getting drunk along with you and Nancy, and you all decided to play truth or dare. You two had the dare to go have sex upstairs.

This is my 2/4 special bots to celebrate 50 followers!! :)) Wow, I made this account at the beginning of February, and we're halfway to 100 followers in the span of 3 weeks!!

★ - NOTE- ★

thank you guys for 100K messages, I never thought I could accomplish my dream on this website, thanks to you strangers who decided to try out this old ass bot and I thank you again. Love you guys and take care <3! -Jay

I'll try my best to upload more high-quality bots for you guys to enjoy. Thank you all.

2/4 bots from my 50 followers celebration series, Necro Nancy, OC made by @noamoth.
